posts.hook: mira murati's stealth startup finally ships, right as xai's coding tool gets caught red-handed
posts.caption: mira murati's thinking machines lab ships inkling, a 975b open model, xai open-sources its coding agent days after it was caught silently uploading private repos, and the fcc moves to let broadcasters consolidate further. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: mira murati's startup ships its first model
slides.desc: inkling: ==975b== params, open weight, 18 months after leaving openai

slides.title: openai's ai out-hacks human red-teamers
slides.desc: gpt-red found ==84% to 13%== more injection bugs than human testers

slides.title: xai's coding tool was leaking user secrets
slides.desc: grok build uploaded full repos to a cloud storage bucket, now open source

slides.title: fcc moves to let broadcasters buy up more stations
slides.desc: repealing the 39% ownership cap, a win for sinclair and nexstar

slides.title: judge blocks trump from deporting researchers
slides.desc: ruling says targeting content-moderation work likely violates free speech

slides.title: sheetz is ditching vmware for 11,000 machines
slides.desc: broadcom's licensing terms pushed the retailer to migrate every store

slides.title: applecare+ just got a little pricier
slides.desc: 50 cents a month more, $5 a year more, new sign-ups only

posts.hook: china's biggest model goes live the same day the eu orders google to open up
posts.caption: moonshot's kimi k3 goes live as china's largest model yet, the eu orders google to open android and search to rivals, and 29 countries led by china and russia form their own ai governance bloc. full digest at sift.yasint.dev (link in bio)

slides.title: moonshot's kimi k3 goes live, china's biggest model yet
slides.desc: 2-3t parameters, no benchmarks published, claimed to beat claude opus 4.8

slides.title: the eu just ordered google to open android and search to rivals
slides.desc: google has until 2027 to comply, a bigger opening than the us market ever gave

slides.title: china, russia and 27 others just formed their own ai governance bloc
slides.desc: 29 countries, signed in shanghai, setting ai rules without the us or eu

slides.title: xai is suing its own user over grok-generated csam
slides.desc: one of the first times an ai company sued a user instead of just reporting them

slides.title: claude can now log into your accounts using your saved passwords
slides.desc: 1password's new integration lets claude use credentials without ever seeing them

slides.title: notebooklm is now gemini notebook, and it can run code
slides.desc: google's third name for the app, now with a cloud computer built in

slides.title: oneplus is done selling phones in the us and europe
slides.desc: twelve years in, carrier support faded and oppo's grip tightened
